Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC is the clear standout today, ranking #1 with a remarkable 95.5 score driven by exceptional long-term performance: 1,583.64% return over 10 years and 525.35% over 5 years, both dwarfing SPY's returns by roughly 14x and 5x respectively. The stock passes all momentum ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages, with a "strong_buy" flag and "clean" momentum signal indicating sustained upward pressure. In contrast, MPC shows more uneven momentum with a weak 6-month return (24.49%) after a strong 3-month surge (47.21%), and underperforms SPY significantly over longer horizons despite solid absolute returns. LINC's correlation to materials (XLB at 0.36) and industrials (XLI at 0.318) suggests exposure to economic cyclicals, while both stocks maintain elevated volatility ratios around 1.44x, indicating higher price swings than the broader market.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
